case_title: STALLINGS WARREN DBA THE SOFTWARE TRAINING GROUP VS KELLER TAMMIE

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,000.00 FILED BY STALLINGS WARREN DBA THE SOFTWARE TRAINING GROUP AS TO DEFENDANT KELLER TAMMIE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-17-1991 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 03
